heading: Offenses and penalties
label: 162 Offenses and penalties
text: Any person who shall willfully resist, prevent, impede, or interfere with any member of the Board or any of its agents or agencies in the performance of duties pursuant to this subchapter shall be punished by a fine of not more than $5,000 or by imprisonment for not more than one year, or both.
notes: Effective Date of 1947 AmendmentFor effective date of amendment by act , see section 104 of act , set out as a note under .June 23, 1947June 23, 1947section 151 of this title
